items.title: S01E01 - Escape from Tomorrow
items.summary: Astronauts Alan Virdon and Peter Burke crash land on a strange planet. After being rescued by a friendly human, Virdon and Burke discover this planet is ruled by intelligent apes. To their horror, they discover that they are back on Earth in the year 3085.

infolabels.title: Escape from Tomorrow
infolabels.plot: Astronauts Alan Virdon and Peter Burke crash land on a strange planet. After being rescued by a friendly human, Virdon and Burke discover this planet is ruled by intelligent apes. To their horror, they discover that they are back on Earth in the year 3085.

items.title: S01E02 - The Gladiators
items.summary: Burke, Virdon and Galen come across two humans fighting and get involved, but lose the magnetic disc. To recover it, they must approach the nearby village, where the ape prefect pits humans in a series of gladiatorial games.

infolabels.title: The Gladiators
infolabels.plot: Burke, Virdon and Galen come across two humans fighting and get involved, but lose the magnetic disc. To recover it, they must approach the nearby village, where the ape prefect pits humans in a series of gladiatorial games.

items.title: S01E03 - The Trap
items.summary: In a ruined city, Burke and Urko are trapped underground and must reluctantly work together to escape, while Alan and Galen must deal with Urko's gorilla patrol in the streets above.

infolabels.title: The Trap
infolabels.plot: In a ruined city, Burke and Urko are trapped underground and must reluctantly work together to escape, while Alan and Galen must deal with Urko's gorilla patrol in the streets above.

items.title: S01E04 - The Good Seeds
items.summary: Burke and Virdon have to seek the help of a gorilla farmer and his family when Galen falls sick.

infolabels.title: The Good Seeds
infolabels.plot: Burke and Virdon have to seek the help of a gorilla farmer and his family when Galen falls sick.

items.title: S01E05 - The Legacy
items.summary: Burke and Virdon are helped by a young woman and a young boy while searching for an underground computer in a ruined city, but their plans go awry when Alan is captured and Urko uses the boy to get information from the astronaut.

infolabels.title: The Legacy
infolabels.plot: Burke and Virdon are helped by a young woman and a young boy while searching for an underground computer in a ruined city, but their plans go awry when Alan is captured and Urko uses the boy to get information from the astronaut.

items.title: S01E06 - Tomorrow's Tide
items.summary: An ape who runs a fishing business plans to use Virdon and Burke as slaves after he captures them.

infolabels.title: Tomorrow's Tide
infolabels.plot: An ape who runs a fishing business plans to use Virdon and Burke as slaves after he captures them.

items.title: S01E07 - The Surgeon
items.summary: Galen must use all his charm to try and persuade his ex-girlfriend, a female ape surgeon named Kira, to operate on Virdon using a forbidden human anatomy book, after the astronaut is shot.

infolabels.title: The Surgeon
infolabels.plot: Galen must use all his charm to try and persuade his ex-girlfriend, a female ape surgeon named Kira, to operate on Virdon using a forbidden human anatomy book, after the astronaut is shot.

items.title: S01E08 - The Deception
items.summary: When the guys try to track down the apes who are framing humans for crimes in a small community, Fauna, a blind female ape, falls in love with Burke while believing him to be a chimpanzee.

infolabels.title: The Deception
infolabels.plot: When the guys try to track down the apes who are framing humans for crimes in a small community, Fauna, a blind female ape, falls in love with Burke while believing him to be a chimpanzee.

items.title: S01E09 - The Horse Race
items.summary: Virdon decides to take part in a dangerous horse race even though he runs the risk of being captured by Urko.

infolabels.title: The Horse Race
infolabels.plot: Virdon decides to take part in a dangerous horse race even though he runs the risk of being captured by Urko.

items.title: S01E10 - The Interrogation
items.summary: Burke undergoes a horrific interrogation after being captured whilst Virdon and Galen mount a rescue attempt.

infolabels.title: The Interrogation
infolabels.plot: Burke undergoes a horrific interrogation after being captured whilst Virdon and Galen mount a rescue attempt.

items.title: S01E11 - The Tyrant
items.summary: Aboro, a despot, is making community life a misery; Burke, Virdon, and Galen decide to rob him of his powers.

infolabels.title: The Tyrant
infolabels.plot: Aboro, a despot, is making community life a misery; Burke, Virdon, and Galen decide to rob him of his powers.

items.title: S01E12 - The Cure
items.summary: Thanks to their advanced medical knowledge, Burke and Virdon are able to help a village struck with malaria, but risk discovery.

infolabels.title: The Cure
infolabels.plot: Thanks to their advanced medical knowledge, Burke and Virdon are able to help a village struck with malaria, but risk discovery.

items.title: S01E13 - The Liberator
items.summary: Burke and Virdon are captured by a bunch of humans determined to hand them over to the Apes.

infolabels.title: The Liberator
infolabels.plot: Burke and Virdon are captured by a bunch of humans determined to hand them over to the Apes.

items.title: S01E14 - Up Above the World So High
items.summary: Burke and Virdon join forces with Leuric, a human attempting to fly by building himself a hang glider.

infolabels.title: Up Above the World So High
infolabels.plot: Burke and Virdon join forces with Leuric, a human attempting to fly by building himself a hang glider.
